# stoner

         .-'''-. ,---------.    ,-----.    ,---.   .--.    .-''-.  .-------.
        / _     \\          \ .'  .-,  '.  |    \  |  |  .'_ _   \ |  _ _   \
       (`' )/`--' `--.  ,---'/ ,-.|  \ _ \ |  ,  \ |  | / ( ` )   '| ( ' )  |
      (_ o _).       |   \  ;  \  '_ /  | :|  |\_ \|  |. (_ o _)  ||(_ o _) /
       (_,_). '.     :_ _:  |  _`,/ \ _/  ||  _( )_\  ||  (_,_)___|| (_,_).' __
      .---.  \  :    (_I_)  : (  '\_/ \   ;| (_ o _)  |'  \   .---.|  |\ \  |  |
      \    `-'  |   (_(=)_)  \ `"/  \  ) / |  (_,_)\  | \  `-'    /|  | \ `'   /
       \       /     (_I_)    '. \_/``".'  |  |    |  |  \       / |  |  \    /
        `-...-'      '---'      '-----'    '--'    '--'   `'-..-'  ''-'   `'-'

Stoner is a helper package for writing montagu-imports concerning
touchstones and associated responsibilities and expectations. It allows
creation of or changes to a touchstone to be specified by CSV files.

# Using stoner

- `install.packages("stoner")`
- Create a [montagu-import](https://github.com/vimc/montagu-imports).
- Write CSV files in a folder called `meta` inside that import folder,
  or use `stoner::stone_dump(con, touchstone, path)` to dump a set of
  CSVs for an existing touchstone, which you could (carefully) modify.
- For your *extract* call `stoner::stone_extract(path, con)`
- For your *test-extract* call
  `stoner::stone_test_extract(extracted_data)`
- For your *transform* call `stoner::stone_transform(extracted_data)`
- For your *test-transform* call
  `stoner::stone_test_transform(transform_data)`
- For your *load* call `stoner::stone_load(transformed_data, con)`

The above is the simplest case. You should also write some load tests as
usual, but these can now concentrate entirely on what rows the
particular import is expected to add. See the vignette for more detail.

# Testing

Some unit tests require a database connection to be able to run. Use
helper commands to start a docker container with a testing database \*
`./inst/db/db_start` - to start the test database \*
`./inst/db/db_stop` - stop the test database \* `./inst/db/db_clear` -
remove all data from the test database

Or from R

    test_db_start()
    test_db_stop()
    test_db_clear()

# Package index

## All functions

- [`stone_dump()`](https://vimc.github.io/stoner/reference/stone_dump.md)
  : Dump touchstone from database to CSV.
- [`stone_extract()`](https://vimc.github.io/stoner/reference/stone_extract.md)
  : Extract touchstone-relevant data
- [`stone_load()`](https://vimc.github.io/stoner/reference/stone_load.md)
  : Load touchstone data to database
- [`stone_stochastic_central()`](https://vimc.github.io/stoner/reference/stone_stochastic_central.md)
  : Produce central average from stochastic files.
- [`stone_stochastic_cert_verify()`](https://vimc.github.io/stoner/reference/stone_stochastic_cert_verify.md)
  : Validate stochastic parameter certificate
- [`stone_stochastic_graph()`](https://vimc.github.io/stoner/reference/stone_stochastic_graph.md)
  : Stochastic plot
- [`stone_stochastic_process()`](https://vimc.github.io/stoner/reference/stone_stochastic_process.md)
  : Process stochastic data
- [`stone_stochastic_standardise()`](https://vimc.github.io/stoner/reference/stone_stochastic_standardise.md)
  : Standardise stochastic data files
- [`stone_stochastic_upload()`](https://vimc.github.io/stoner/reference/stone_stochastic_upload.md)
  : Upload stochastic data to annex
- [`stone_test_extract()`](https://vimc.github.io/stoner/reference/stone_test_extract.md)
  : Test the extracted data.
- [`stone_test_transform()`](https://vimc.github.io/stoner/reference/stone_test_transform.md)
  : Test the transformed data.
- [`stone_transform()`](https://vimc.github.io/stoner/reference/stone_transform.md)
  : Transform extracted_data into transformed_data
- [`stoner_calculate_dalys()`](https://vimc.github.io/stoner/reference/stoner_calculate_dalys.md)
  : Calculating DALYs for stochastic or central estimates
- [`stoner_dalys_for_db()`](https://vimc.github.io/stoner/reference/stoner_dalys_for_db.md)
  : Create CSV with DALYs for an uploaded burden estimate set
- [`stoner_life_table()`](https://vimc.github.io/stoner/reference/stoner_life_table.md)
  : Calculate life expectancy table
